assignments.name: Assign_Parent_Product_3
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Copy 1 of Assign Parent Product

assignments.name: Assign_Product_to_Line_2
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Assign Product to Line

decisions.name: Copy_1_of_Check_for_associated_products
decisions.label: Copy 1 of Check for associated products

decisions.name: Copy_1_of_Check_if_Adding_Accessory
decisions.label: Copy 1 of Check if Adding Accessory

decisions.name: Copy_1_of_Check_if_parent_or_accessory_path
decisions.label: Copy 1 of Check if parent or accessory path

Flow.description: Original Name: Opportunity - Add Asset v3. Flow triggered by Add Products button on Opportunity record. Includes Fault Messages.

formulas.name: managedServiceBodyNone
formulas.expression: "No Managed Service has been added to this device configuration " & {!parentProduct.Product2.Name} & BR()

formulas.name: managedServiceTextSome
formulas.expression: {!managed_services.firstSelectedRow.Sub_Product__r.Name} & " has been added to " & {!parentProduct.Product2.Name} & " - Grouping: " & TEXT({!varCount}) & ". Cost - " & TEXT({!MPS_Charge}) & BR()

Flow.label: MACD - Opportunity - Add Products v3

recordLookups.name: Copy_1_of_Get_All_Opp_Products
recordLookups.label: Copy 1 of Get All Opp Products

fields.name: displayTextAccessories
fields.fieldText: Please input information for {!Loop_Accessories.Sub_Product__r.Name}

fields.name: Copy_1_of_EOL_Alert
fields.fieldText: The Product selected is end-of-life before the end of the Contract and requires approval of a director.

fields.name: Do_you_want_to_add_an_accessory
fields.fieldText: Do you want to add an accessory?

screens.name: Copy_1_of_Add_an_Accessory_Screen
screens.label: Copy 1 of Add an Accessory Screen

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Do_you_want_to_add_an_accessory
fields.fieldText: Do you want to add an accessory?

screens.name: Copy_1_of_Create_Parent_Product_Fault
screens.label: Copy 1 of Create Parent Product Fault

screens.name: Copy_1_of_Update_Product_Action_Screen
screens.label: Copy 1 of Update Product Action Screen

fields.name: Copy_1_of_What_action_would_you_like_to_perform
fields.fieldText: Would like to perform another action?

fields.name: Copy_1_of_What_product_would_you_like_to_perform_the_action_on
fields.fieldText: What product type would you like to perform the action on?

fields.name: updateDetailsText
fields.fieldText: Please input details for the product {!Loop_Selected_Lines.Product_Name__c}

fields.name: locationCreated
fields.fieldText: The location has successfully been created. Press "Previous" then "Next" for the list to update.

fields.name: Copy_3_of_displayTextAccessories
fields.fieldText: Please input information for {!managed_services.firstSelectedRow.Sub_Product__r.Name}

fields.name: managedServiceText
fields.fieldText:
The MPS Standard fee is £5 per month.

If you have a different price, please upload director approval here.

fields.name: noAccessoriesText
fields.fieldText: No Accessories currently available for this product

fields.name: EOL_Alert
fields.fieldText: The Product selected is end-of-life before the end of the Contract and requires approval of a director.

fields.name: Parent_or_Accessory
fields.fieldText: What would you like to choose, a parent product or an accessory?

fields.name: Would_you_like_to_associate_this_to_an_existing_Asset
fields.fieldText: Would you like to associate this to an existing Asset?

fields.name: What_action_would_you_like_to_perform
fields.fieldText: What action would you like to perform?

fields.name: What_product_would_you_like_to_perform_the_action_on
fields.fieldText: What product would you like to perform the action on?

fields.name: addText
fields.fieldText: Add a new product configuration to the deal.

fields.name: updateText
fields.fieldText: Update the quantities, prices/costs and supplier information related to products.

fields.name: removeText
fields.fieldText: Remove a product, accessory or managed service from a configuration.
